base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of mini_games_ui — a ui from 1997 final fantasy vii. Chocobo Racing + Fort Condor RTS + Submarine + Snowboarding mini-games UI. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
